prompt: Edit image 1 by replacing the “Binance” exchange name with the BOSCH logo from image 3, keeping the font size and alignment. Add the Starbucks QR code from image 2 directly beneath the “Total Value” field, scaled to fit in the empty space above the “Continue” button. Do not modify prices or other text.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Replace the 'Binance' text, located under the 'EXCHANGE' heading, with the BOSCH logo from image 3. Scale the BOSCH logo to fit the exact footprint of the original 'Binance' text, maintaining its horizontal alignment. Additionally, integrate the Starbucks QR code from image 2 into the empty dark space directly below the 'Total Value' amount and above the 'CONTINUE' button. Scale the QR code to maximize its size within this available vertical space while preserving its aspect ratio and ensuring horizontal center alignment. Do not modify any other text or numerical values, including prices or quantities, in image 1.
objects: Trading pair and Exchange information section (including "TRADING PAIR", "BTC / USD", Bitcoin logo, "EXCHANGE" heading)
